englishDefinitions: Relating to a lively style of music and dancing associated with the 1960s and 1970s.
Very energetic, fast, or fashionable in a lively way.
persianTranslation: گو-گو؛ سبک موسیقی و رقص پرانرژی
examples: The club played old go-go music all night.
She wore a go-go dress and white boots to the party.
Go-go dancing became popular in many nightlife venues.
